caption: The video appears to be a presentation or tutorial on a digital platform, likely focused on systems thinking and modeling. The main content of the video is a visual map with various interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "model sharing," "developing models," "systems thinking," and "leadership." These nodes are linked by arrows, suggesting a flow or relationship between the concepts. The video seems to be explaining how these elements interconnect and contribute to solving problems or understanding complex systems.
